members.name: Alignment
members.summary: The alignment of the container's children (must be one of [constant ALIGNMENT_BEGIN], [constant ALIGNMENT_CENTER], or [constant ALIGNMENT_END]).

members.name: LastWrapAlignment
members.summary: The wrap behavior of the last, partially filled row or column (must be one of [constant LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_INHERIT], [constant LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_BEGIN], [constant LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_CENTER], or [constant LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_END]).

members.name: ReverseFill
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], reverses fill direction. Horizontal [FlowContainer]s will fill rows bottom to top, vertical [FlowContainer]s will fill columns right to left. When using a vertical [FlowContainer] with a right to left [member Control.layout_direction], columns will fill left to right instead.

members.name: Vertical
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [FlowContainer] will arrange its children vertically, rather than horizontally. Can't be changed when using [HFlowContainer] and [VFlowContainer].

values.name: ALIGNMENT_BEGIN
values.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the beginning of the container, i.e. top if orientation is vertical, left if orientation is horizontal (right for RTL layout).

values.name: ALIGNMENT_CENTER
values.summary: The child controls will be centered in the container.

values.name: ALIGNMENT_END
values.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the end of the container, i.e. bottom if orientation is vertical, right if orientation is horizontal (left for RTL layout).

values.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_BEGIN
values.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the beginning of the previous row or column.

values.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
values.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the center of the previous row or column.

values.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_END
values.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the end of the previous row or column.

values.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_INHERIT
values.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the previous row or column in accordance with [member alignment].

constants.name: ALIGNMENT_BEGIN
constants.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the beginning of the container, i.e. top if orientation is vertical, left if orientation is horizontal (right for RTL layout).

constants.name: ALIGNMENT_CENTER
constants.summary: The child controls will be centered in the container.

constants.name: ALIGNMENT_END
constants.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the end of the container, i.e. bottom if orientation is vertical, right if orientation is horizontal (left for RTL layout).

constants.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_INHERIT
constants.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the previous row or column in accordance with [member alignment].

constants.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_BEGIN
constants.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the beginning of the previous row or column.

constants.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
constants.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the center of the previous row or column.

constants.name: LAST_WRAP_ALIGNMENT_END
constants.summary: The last partially filled row or column will wrap aligned to the end of the previous row or column.
